summary: Complete testing of P2 (Expanded Gear with Grenades/Utilities) and P3 (Price Tracker with MongoDB snapshots) features. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Zero regressions detected.

issues: Minor console warnings about span in option/select (hydration warning) - cosmetic only, functionality unaffected

critical_code_review_comments: P2 Gear expansion properly implemented - 10 new items (4 grenades + 6 utilities) added to personal_gear.py
P3 Price tracking correctly uses MongoDB for snapshots via 'price_snapshots' collection
Price data aggregates from live_api.py cache + ship_purchases.py static data as documented
All new endpoints properly public (no auth required) as designed
Frontend PriceTracker.jsx uses proper data-testid attributes for testing
Minor hydration warnings in console (span inside select/option) - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All P2 Gear + P3 Price Tracker + regression tests passed)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing test user geartest. Price snapshots auto-created on server startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 and P3 features fully tested and working. Gear page now has 38 weapons (4 grenades, 6 utilities added). Price Tracker at /prices tracks 150 items (50 ships, 50 weapons, 50 components) with MongoDB snapshots. Price data comes from live Star Citizen Wiki API + static ship_purchases.py. All /api/prices/* endpoints are public. Use test user geartest/password123 for authenticated endpoints.
